updates.author: Andrej Karpathy
updates.text: 🚀 Excited to announce LLM101n — a course on building and training large language models from scratch. Available now on GitHub.

updates.author: Andrej Karpathy
updates.text: Software 3.0 — the era where LLMs become the new OS. Apps are now natural language prompts, orchestration becomes engineering, and 'vibe coding' is a real paradigm shift.

updates.author: Andrej Karpathy
updates.text: Note: the next generation of educators will need to deeply understand both classical ML fundamentals AND prompt-engineering with frontier models. The skill bar is rising fast.

updates.author: Yann LeCun (杨立昆)
updates.text: LLMs are autoregressive — they predict next tokens, not actions. For true autonomous agents we need world models: JEPA architecture that plans in latent space, not in token space.

updates.author: Yann LeCun (杨立昆)
updates.text: Open-source large models are a strategic necessity for Europe. We cannot depend on a handful of US companies for the most critical technology of our era.

updates.author: Yann LeCun (杨立昆)
updates.text: The next decade of AI research will move away from scaling autoregressive transformers. Energy efficiency matters and 'thinking in tokens' is too expensive.

updates.author: Demis Hassabis
updates.text: AlphaFold 3 is now available to all researchers worldwide. We're unlocking the protein universe — nature's most complex molecular machinery — for science to tackle disease, sustainability and more.

updates.author: Demis Hassabis
updates.text: Gemini 2.5 Pro now leads the LMArena leaderboard with a 14-point gap over the next model, particularly strong on math, science and coding.

updates.author: Sam Altman
updates.text: GPT-5 launches today. Smarter, faster, multimodal end-to-end. Available in ChatGPT for all paid tiers and the API.

updates.author: Sam Altman
updates.text: Compute is the new oil. Every company we talk to is spending more on inference than training. The growth rate is unprecedented.

updates.author: Ilya Sutskever
updates.text: Sequoia Capital was the first check into SSI. We're building safe superintelligence with a single north star: capability and safety must be developed together.

updates.author: Ilya Sutskever
updates.text: The era of 'just add more compute' is ending. What's next is figuring out how to learn from far less data — that's the path to AGI.

updates.author: Jim Fan (范瑞杰)
updates.text: ASPIRE: a self-evolving skill library for robot code agents. The 100th task should NOT feel like the 1st. We're building the foundation agent that learns to add itself to its own library.

updates.author: Jim Fan (范瑞杰)
updates.text: The Physical Turing Test is clear: when a video of a robot doing real-world work becomes indistinguishable from a human, we've arrived. Here's the roadmap.

updates.author: OpenAI
updates.text: Codex is now deployed across every team at OpenAI. 70% of merged PRs in the last month were Codex-assisted. The future of work is agentic.

updates.author: OpenAI
updates.text: o3-pro launches in the API today. State-of-the-art on AIME, GPQA and SWE-bench Verified. Designed for tasks that require sustained, careful reasoning.

updates.author: Google DeepMind
updates.text: Gemini Robotics — our vision-language-action model that controls robots directly. Outperforms prior methods by 2x on dexterous manipulation benchmarks.

updates.author: Google DeepMind
updates.text: Project Astra is rolling out to Pixel and Samsung devices. Multimodal AI assistant that sees, hears and responds in real time across apps.

note: 手动精选的代表性动态 (scrape.do 限流时降级)
